# CWE-1240 safe: standard AES-GCM encryption
lang: go
file: CWE-1240-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1240 mitigated: aes/gcm from the standard library protects session tokens.

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/base64"
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func SealSessionTokenSafe(key []byte) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		token := c.PostForm("token")
		block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		gcm, err := cipher.NewGCM(block)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		nonce := make([]byte, gcm.NonceSize())
		if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		sealed := gcm.Seal(nonce, nonce, []byte(token), nil)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"sealed": base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(sealed)})
	}
}
